creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MX11}
#VBOX_PROGS+=   VBoxSDL
.endif

VBoxSDL does not build. But despite this, I will commit the new ports emulators/virtualbox-ose-70, emulators/virtualbox-ose-kmod-70 and emulators/virtualbox-ose-nox11-70 as experimental today. Hopefully we will fix this soon.
